mapper.sql: id, user_id, asset_code, asset_name, asset_kind, asset_type, market, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_info ( user_id, asset_code, asset_name, asset_kind, asset_type, market, status ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{assetCode}, #{assetName}, #{assetKind}, #{assetType}, #{market}, #{status} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE id = LAST_INSERT_ID(id), asset_name = COALESCE(asset_name, VALUES(asset_name)), asset_type = COALESCE(asset_type, VALUES(asset_type)), status = VALUES(status), update_time = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
mapper.select: SELECT FROM asset_info WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id DESC
